title: Kustomize, Helm 4, Rendering, Validation, Field Ownership, and Promotion · Cluster Case: K8s Kustomize Resources Patches
summary: A platform team copies environment manifests, renders an unreviewed chart, stores credentials in values, and promotes mutable images without diff, ownership, or rollback evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the k8s kustomize resources patches increment in rendered environment release package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compose Kustomize resources, components, overlays, prefixes, namespaces, labels, images, replacements, and patches without corrupting selectors or source bases.
Diagnose desired state, admission, scheduling, image, mount, process, probe, endpoint, DNS, policy, routing, storage, node, and application layers using the least invasive evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example environment overlay drifts from base, Helm values change immutable fields, rendered resources contain a secret, and promotion rebuilds a new image. Render, diff, validate, pin, sign, promote the same artifact, and retain rollback evidence. Competency probe: Compose Kustomize resources, components, overlays, prefixes, namespaces, labels, images, replacements, and patches without corrupting selectors or source bases. content.code:
# Worked focus: k8s-kustomize-resources-patches — Compose Kustomize resources, components, overlays, prefixes, namespaces, labels, images, replacements, and patches without corrupting selectors or source bases.
  # Evidence: k8s-worked-k8s-packaging-kustomize-helm-promotion-5
  - competency: k8s-worked-k8s-packaging-kustomize-helm-promotion-5
    artifact: release-package.yaml
    decision: worked k8s packaging kustomize helm promotion 5
    environment: managed canary cluster with provider-specific load balancing
    fault-injection: drop one metrics series during an autoscaling surge
    retained-proof: accessible incident timeline with causal regression evidence
    case-key: worked5
    change: |
      base: reviewed-kubernetes-resources
      overlay: production-patches
      generators: hashed-config-no-secret-output
      helm: 4.2.2-oci-digest-pinned
      render: offline-and-server-validated
      field-manager: platform-reconciler
      promotion: immutable-digest
      rollback: compatibility-tested
    verify: kubectl kustomize overlays/production && helm template status oci://registry.example.test/status --version 1.4.0
    failure: Reject copied manifests, unpinned chart dependencies, secrets in values, render-only confidence, field ownership theft, or Git history as safe rollback proof.
    repair: Compose reviewed bases, render deterministically, validate schemas and policy, diff server behavior, preserve ownership, and promote immutable artifacts.
content.caption: Runnable Kubernetes object and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
